title: AI Pair Programming
subtitle: Real parallel coordinated development with AI

setup.title: Configure Pair Programming Session
setup.goalPlaceholder: e.g. Add user authentication with JWT tokens
setup.devScopePlaceholder: e.g. Frontend login/register components and Redux store
setup.aiScopeLabel: AI Scope (what the AI will work on)
setup.aiScopePlaceholder: e.g. Backend auth API, JWT middleware, and integration tests
setup.hint: The AI will work on its scope in parallel while you focus on yours. You can chat to coordinate in real time.

chat.question: AI is asking
chat.empty: No messages yet. Send a message to coordinate with your AI partner.

devWork.reminder: Focus on your scope while the AI handles its portion.

conflicts.title: Scope Conflicts
conflicts.description: The AI may have touched files in your scope. Please review.

empty.title: AI Pair Programming
empty.description: Work in parallel with AI on complementary parts of your codebase. You focus on one area, the AI handles another — coordinated in real time.
empty.feature1: Parallel work on different file sets

errors.startFailed: Failed to start pair programming session
